creator: ports@sapka.me
text:
Created attachment 247034
ports patch

this is my first port, so yeah.

I want to add a port of "glulxe" (https://github.com/erkyrath/glulxe) but it requires a glk implementation alredy present on the machine for compilation. I've been told that since those implementations are a separate entity and can be shared between glk vms, it should be a separate port.

Glkterm is full-featured implementation and it built son FreeBSD 14 without any problems. If this port it accepted, I will submit a port for glulxe.
